name: Eldritch Survivors
short_description: Uncover the secrets behind the protagonists' fate, trapped in an endless cycle of death. Eldritch Survivor is a survival-like game that maximizes both the narrative and the excitement of each dungeon encounter. Immerse yourself in a 99% pure Lovecraftian world and confront the terror of the unknown.
detailed_description:
"Eh, what…? Why am I suddenly so sleepy? No, this can't be…"

The protagonist suddenly falls asleep and awakens in a strange place.

Without thinking, she steps outside, only to meet a brutal death at the hands of monsters.

However, instead of waking up from a dream, she finds herself awakening once again in the exact strange location.

No matter how many times she steps outside, she continues to face the same horrifying deaths and moments of terror.

Meanwhile, unfamiliar individuals, each with their own reasons, find themselves trapped in the same situation.

Will they be able to unravel the tangled threads of their fate and find a way to escape this nightmare?

Survive from the horde of relentless monsters!

『Eldritch Survivor』 is a survivor-like game where you must defeat a horde of monsters and survive against overwhelming colossal entities. In a constant state of high tension, you must make the best choices at every moment, acquiring enhanced weapons and powerful magic to move closer to the light of survival.

Mysterious flowers bloom bravely amidst the horrifying horde of monsters.

The Lang Glass emits an enchanting glow like a beam of light in the darkness.

Strange quests await you beyond the dense foliage.

Utilize the various elements of the forest to your advantage to survive in the harsh environment.

Persevere through the vast wilderness and keep pushing forward relentlessly to survive!

Maintain your sanity, and don't allow madness to take control.

You have no choice but to become a monster to survive and defeat the horde of monsters.

In times of crisis, sacrifice your sanity for powerful magic and strength! But beware: every time madness seeps into the cracks left by your fading sanity, death draws closer.

Escape from the fear of the unknown and the endless cycle of death.

People from the real world have suddenly fallen into a deep dream, and the atmosphere resembles a dreamland, a land of illusions, which is ominously unsettling.

Four distinct characters, each with unique stories, find themselves trapped in a vast flow where their fates are tested. Guide them to survive as they strive to break free and unveil the secrets that weave together their destinies. With determination and courage, it's up to you to save them with your own hands!
